Design system  /  Identity  /  Foundation

A Dutch open-source product company.

Apps that install themselves. Optional Support. No vendor lock-in. Built on Nextcloud.

Five values · all Dutch
Proudly Dutch
We design from Dutch standards: NL Design System, Common Ground, API-first principles. And we wear that on our sleeve.
Innovative
Open source, API-first, federated data models. We lead, we don't follow.
Commercially driven
Pragmatic, focused, results-oriented. Solutions that work, not performances that impress.
Penny-wise
Open source, reuse, careful with public money. The same discipline that defines our software.
Reliable
Stable, transparent, predictable. The deeper-blue palette underscores it. Trust isn't ornament.
What we build · apps, not contracts

The shift: from project company to product company.

Historically our work came from projects, training, and consulting: assignments where a customer hired us to build, implement, or guide something. That work still exists, but it's no longer what Conduction is about.

Conduction is a product company. We build an ecosystem of cooperating Nextcloud apps, and customers can use us without ever having to talk to us.

Download from the Nextcloud app store, install, done. All apps are always free and open source: no Community/Enterprise split, no feature gating, no "Pro" tier.

We earn a living through two supporting layers around the ecosystem, see right. Both are secondary, never leading: every brand surface (website, print, presentations) leads with the apps and the ecosystem. Support and Services are explained honestly where relevant, never as a forced funnel or upgrade pressure.

Revenue layer · 1

Support

An optional safety net on top of the free software. Helpdesk plus a proactive, telemetry-driven approach. Two tiers, Standard and Premium, billed per app × per user × per year.

"Support" in customer language · "SLA" only in contract language
Revenue layer · 2

Services

Project work with a published rate card. Development €125/hr · Consultancy €150/hr · Training (online: free, in person: €1,000–1,200 per half-day) · Certification per certificate. Optional prepaid bundle of €15,000 with a 10% discount.

For customers who need more than install + Support
The triangle · three brands, three jobs
The company
Conduction
The Dutch open-source product company that builds everything. Always visible: About, footer, contracts. Hexagon avatar.
ConNext
The product brand
ConNext
The public product brand for the Conduction-on-Nextcloud ecosystem. Pure positioning, typographic wordmark, no separate codebase.
The platform
Nextcloud
The host platform that ConNext extends, from office suite into workplace. Quoted, not claimed. The blue is a guest colour in our system.
ConNext is a Conduction proposition for Nextcloud.
The architecture · six component cards around the workspace
Nextcloud
the workspace
Technical Core
5 apps
Workplace
9 apps
AI
3 apps
Integrated
7 apps
App Builder
coming soon
